---
title: "Field Marshal Sir John Colborne, 1st Lord Seaton"
---

## Field Marshal Sir John Colborne, 1st Lord Seaton

**Dates:** (16 Feb 1778-17 April 1863)

### Description

stepbrother of FMY

### Biography

He married (21 June 1814) Elizabeth Yonge (7 March 1790-28 Nov 1872).  He was created a peer in 1839, and  made Field Marshal in 1860.  WCY was in his regiment, was first cousin to his wife, and married his stepsister.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22 1899
- [To Mrs Swinton, Sunday Aug 13th [1899[[footnote:1]]]](../letters/3417_To_Mrs_Swinton.html)
- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from Mar 5th 1896
- Letter from Jany 13th 1890
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from  Feb 21st [1862 ]
- Letter from April 10th 1860
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from September 28, 1857.
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]
- Letter from [July 1853]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
